'''latate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:rheumily|rheumily]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-t-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rheumily|rheumily]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| latate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:latate|latate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:latatesher|latatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:latatesherĂ«m|latatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:latatero|latatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:latateshĂ«|latateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:latateshĂ«m|latateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilatatero|gokilatatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokilatateshĂ«|gokilatateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilatateshĂ«m|gokilatateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:golatankerom|golatankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golatankeshĂ«|golatankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golatankeshĂ«m|golatankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:golatankeya|golatankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lataterom|lataterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:latatemu|latatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:latateya|latateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilataterom|gokilataterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilatatemu|gokilatatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokilatateya|gokilatateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:latatate|latatate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:latatatesher|latatatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:latatatesherĂ«m|latatatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:latatatero|latatatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:latatateshĂ«|latatateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:latatateshĂ«m|latatateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilatatatero|gokilatatatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokilatatateshĂ«|gokilatatateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilatatateshĂ«m|gokilatatateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:golatatankerom|golatatankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golatatankeshĂ«|golatatankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golatatankeshĂ«m|golatatankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:golatatankeya|golatatankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:latataterom|latataterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:latatatemu|latatatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:latatateya|latatateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilatataterom|gokilatataterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilatatatemu|gokilatatatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokilatatateya|gokilatatateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:lĂŠtĂŠte|lĂŠtĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:lĂŠtĂŠtesher|lĂŠtĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lĂŠtĂŠtesherĂ«m|lĂŠtĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lĂŠtĂŠtero|lĂŠtĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:lĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«|lĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«m|lĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilĂŠtĂŠtero|gokilĂŠtĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokilĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«|gokilĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«m|gokilĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:golĂŠtĂŠnkerom|golĂŠtĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golĂŠtĂŠnkeshĂ«|golĂŠtĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golĂŠtĂŠnkeshĂ«m|golĂŠtĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:golĂŠtĂŠnkeya|golĂŠtĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lĂŠtĂŠterom|lĂŠtĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lĂŠtĂŠtemu|lĂŠtĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:lĂŠtĂŠteya|lĂŠtĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilĂŠtĂŠterom|gokilĂŠtĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilĂŠtĂŠtemu|gokilĂŠtĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokilĂŠtĂŠteya|gokilĂŠtĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:laftafte|laftafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:laftaftesher|laftaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:laftaftesherĂ«m|laftaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:laftaftero|laftaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:laftafteshĂ«|laftafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:laftafteshĂ«m|laftafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilaftaftero|gokilaftaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokilaftafteshĂ«|gokilaftafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilaftafteshĂ«m|gokilaftafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:golaftafnkerom|golaftafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golaftafnkeshĂ«|golaftafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golaftafnkeshĂ«m|golaftafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:golaftafnkeya|golaftafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:laftafterom|laftafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:laftaftemu|laftaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:laftafteya|laftafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilaftafterom|gokilaftafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilaftaftemu|gokilaftaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokilaftafteya|gokilaftafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
